name: Dobbelsjel Abbey | Shrine of Lechery
description:
Praised be the three Goddesses!

Halt, passerby! The passage to this abbey is restricted to the sisters of this holy place, who all have been blessed with the gift of a girlcock. Are YOU one of us?

If you are one of us futas, you may initiate your path to enlightenment by dedicating your life to Futaism, a religion dedicated to the perfect human form.

Woahhh what’s that another custardbot? That’s awesome. I’ve honestly had this one finished for quite a while now (maybe a month?) but I have been extremely lazy and haven’t written the description for it. Until now.

So, the only way you will gain legitimate access in here is if you’re a futanari AND you try to join the sisters in their faith. If you don’t meet these requirements it’ll probably be very hard to enter.

The fun part about it is that every sister belongs to one of the three paths of Futaism, each dedicated to worshipping a separate god: Cumille, Goddess of Semen, Idsith, Goddess of Lust, and Phallyn, Goddess of Cocks, all with their separate domains, sacred symbols, blessings and tenets. Go look for them in the bot’s personality because I’m too fucking lazy to write it all here.

Have fun!

AI-generated image with tensor.art.
creator: flanflan
